title: upsetocc
text: upsetocc Make the specified occurrence current. Explain this code long upsetocc (unsigned char*entity, longoccnum); Copy Parameters entity Name of the entity. You can specify zero or an empty string to denote the current entity. occnum Sequence number of the occurrence that must be made current. Specify -1 to make the last occurrence current. Return Values Table 1. Values returned by upsetocc Value Meaning >0 The sequence number of the new current occurrence -1 The occurrence could not be made current. Most likely causes: Occnum is out of range, or Entity does not exist, or it is not painted on the component. Use Library: yrtl Description upsetocc makes the occurrence of entity with sequence number occnum the current occurrence. The argument entity is the name of the entity whose occurrence will be made current. If entity is zero or is an empty string, the current entity is used. You can specify -1 for occnum to make the last occurrence current. upsetocc is equivalent to the setocc ProcScript statement. Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> EXPORT void set_last_occ () { (void) upsetocc("", -1); /* Make the last occurrence current */ } Copy Related Links upaddocc Create an empty occurrence of an entity. updelocc Remove an occurrence of the specified entity from the hitlist. updisocc Discard one or more occurrences of the specified entity from the hitlist.
